name: nelumbo nucifera
mechanism: Used in ayurveda and buddhist practices for calm and devotion.
safetyNotes: May cause moderate risk: side effects or medication interactions are plausible. avoid use during pregnancy unless advised by a clinician, alcohol or or other cns depressants. Avoid combining with sedatives; Avoid in pregnancy; Avoid with hypotension; Avoid with sedation.
